mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in nonfarm payrolls (PAYEMS) above 100k signals strong labor market demand, boosting corporate earnings visibility and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 100k growth.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in industrial production (INDPRO) above its 12-month moving average indicates expanding manufacturing capacity utilization, generating positive momentum in S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in INDPRO expansion phases are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly acceleration in GDP growth (GDPC1) above 3% signals robust economic demand, creating positive risk-on sentiment that drives S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where GDPC1 exceeds 3% growth.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in CPIAUCSL and rise in FEDFUNDS indicates disinflationary monetary tightening, which reduces equity risk premiums and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL falls > 0.5% MoM and FEDFUNDS rises > 0.25pp MoM
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where CPIAUCSL declines and FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly drop in residential construction permits (RSAFS) below 400k signals reduced housing demand, prompting central banks to adopt accommodative policies that drive positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in RSAFS contraction phases are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A divergence between rising unemployment (UNRATE) and falling initial jobless claims (HOUST) indicates labor market fragility, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days as investors price in recession risks.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.3pp MoM and HOUST falls > 5k MoM
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 50% of instances where UNRATE rises and HOUST falls.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly surge in industrial production (INDPRO) above its 3-month moving average combined with rising capacity utilization signals overheating supply chains, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO exceeds 1.5% growth.
